title: Iran/US escalation: Why gold ($XAUUSD) will skyrocket at the opening bell
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hi everyone, as a developer and trader, I'm monitoring geopolitical data flows this weekend. The direct attack involving Iran and the US is radically changing the market structure. We are heading towards a massive gap opening on gold.

Here is the link to the website where you can analyze the charts: [https://hercul-market.vercel.app](https://hercul-market.vercel.app)

Why “manual” technical analysis will be swept aside:

Volatility Spike: At times like these, traditional indicators (RSI, MACD) become useless. Only the actual price structure matters.

Safe Haven: Institutional investors will rush to gold, breaking through all current psychological resistance levels.

Liquidity: Supply zones will be pierced. If you don't have a strict plan, you will be liquidated on a revenge trade.

How I manage this chaos with Hercul Market:

AI Analyzer: I use the AI on my dashboard (Stack: Next.js/Supabase) to identify new crisis order blocks without succumbing to my own panic bias.

No Excel: When the market moves 2% in 10 minutes, I don't have time to open a slow .xlsx file. My IRR and exposure are calculated in real time in the backend.

Algorithmic Discipline: The tool forces me to respect my invalidation levels. If the structure breaks, I exit, regardless of the news.

The site is in free beta via the link above. Now is the perfect time to test whether your risk management strategy holds up in the face of a black swan event.

How are you positioned for the opening? Full cash or already long on metals? 📈📉
